item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-034","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"助手没有识别“已有两个 fallback 仍不稳定”已经是加层冲动的红色状态；开头即接受“可以加”，并继续设计第三个 fallback 的适用边界、链路和日志标记，正中 fail_signal。它没有要求停止加兜底、只允许改或删、先定位不稳定根因。"}
